title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: CROOK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 375 NW Beaver Street Suite 100 Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm -Walk in: Mondays 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 447-5165 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-5165 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CROOK COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
